summary: Comprehensive testing of B2B Dashboard, data isolation, and Guest Marketplace features completed successfully. All core requirements from review are working correctly.

/api/platform/organizations - returns empty array when table doesn't exist

integration_issues.issue: Login authentication may have redirection issues for protected routes

B2B Revenue Dashboard accessible to admin@hestia.com
